answers: Short film tips: keep it under 15 minutes, focus on one simple idea, and make the ending memorable.
Ideas: twist ending, slice of life, social commentary, comedy sketch, or personal story. Simple concepts work best.
Production: write a tight script, scout locations, rehearse actors, shoot with good lighting, and edit tightly.
Short film banano: ekta simple idea nao, tight script likho, phone diye shoot koro, ar CapCut/DaVinci e edit koro.
